variants: Clara Reitbauer is a professional employed at Nova Drift Corporation, where her expertise in medicine continues to flourish. Born in Golden Orchard, she later attended Quarrywind School of Medicine, which provided her with a solid foundation for her career. Her remarkable contributions to the field have been acknowledged through the awarding of the Ridgeway Star Medal. Clara has chosen to make her home in Gardenstone Hollow, where she enjoys the balance of innovation and tranquility that fuels her passion for healthcare.
